title: Christella semisagittata
taxonomy: Christella semisagittata is classified as a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Christella, which is a group of epiphytic ferns. Christella semisagittata is further classified as a member of the order Polypodiales. This classification is based on its characteristics, such as its leaf structure and growth habit.
